name: Sword Wraith Commander
languages: the languages it knew in life

traits.name: Call to Honor (1/Day)
traits.text: If the commander has taken damage during this combat, it gives itself advantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn, and 1d4 + 1 sword wraith warrior appear in unoccupied spaces within 30 feet of it. The warriors last until they drop to 0 hit points, and they take their turns immediately after the commander's turn on the same initiative count.

traits.name: Martial Fury (bonus)
traits.text: The commander makes one Longsword or Longbow attack, which deals an extra 9 (2d8) necrotic damage on a hit, and attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Turning Defiance
traits.text: The commander and any other sword wraiths within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn Undead.

traits.name: Unusual Nature
traits.text: The commander doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.
